useGraphData coverage 16→51 (+27 net to suite total): added course-level cache invalidation runtime tests (replicated invalidate algorithm — clear-all when no args, topic-only invalidates t: + ALL course keys containing that topic via split(',').includes — substring 'ab' must NOT match 'abc' edge case, summaryId-only invalidates s: only — course caches stay until TTL, no mutate-while-iterate via collect-keys-first). courseKey sort invariance (order-independent, '' for undefined/empty, no-mutation via spread). Listener bus runtime (subscribe+notify firing count, unsubscribe stops notifications, multiple listeners all fire, Set dedups same-listener). Source-level extended (s:/t: prefix invariants, summaryId precedence in cacheKey, skipCustomNodes default false, courseKey priority dispatch courseKey→summaryId→topicId, skipCustomNodes only in topic scope, TTL Date.now()-timestamp check, LRU via delete+set, 'Error al cargar grafo' Spanish fallback, hasSource initial-loading gate, refetch skipCache=true, isEmpty derived from graphData?.nodes.length===0). Result: 74 files / 3125 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 3125/3125 assertions pass; course-level cache invalidation algorithm (split-and-includes substring-safety) + listener bus + courseKey sort invariance pinned
